## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sumit Makhe_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "Google Wallet is available in India for passes, but it still doesn't work on Wear OS here. Please enable the Wear OS app for India so we can access our company IDs and passes from our watches. Also, stop sending links to broken or unavailable pages in your replies"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Iam “TheTraveler” TheTraveler_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I'm trying to remove a newer card I just listed I also removed all old cards while I was there. I'm getting a message that I cannot remove my new card because their subscriptions connected to it you shouldn't be forcing customers to maintain their subscription payments maybe they want to cancel the card because that subscription is ripping them off? if they tell you to remove a card remove it. it isn't the time or place to be trying to protect your subscription payments. now I cancel both!"
